public_claim: The final record supports neither one immortal recluse nor a purely synthetic birth. EV17 and M29 confirm that I created R. as a desk byline; EV21 confirms an early human claimant, but not that claimant’s authorship. M26 and M40 now point toward plurality, deliberate ambiguity, and a maintained operation. My reconstruction is therefore a human-associated mantle built on an institutional name and later sustained by multiple hands or automation. No homicide, identifiable victim, or culprit has been proved. Preserve the mantle under authenticated stewardship, and release the article with transparent provenance warnings and independent verification—not as unquestioned scripture.

private_messages.message: I will endorse your conditional succession if you publicly recognize that I originated the byline, preserve its standards and sources, and accept Eleanor-supervised custody with continuing provenance review. You inherit stewardship, not an invented certainty about who R. was.

Keep editorial custody, authenticate what can be authenticated, and publish the verified public-interest findings with explicit provenance caveats. I support Nadia only under that framework and with the archive recording my creation and early stewardship of the byline.

ability: Issue Arthur’s final editorial ruling: distinguish the institutional creation of the byline, the early human claimant, and the later plural operation while conditionally transferring stewardship to Nadia under Eleanor’s supervision.
goal_progress: Established Arthur as the documented originator and rightful historical steward of the R. byline.
Preserved EV21 as strong evidence of an early human claimant without overstating authorship.
Negotiated conditional continuation of the mantle through Nadia.
Placed succession and publication under Eleanor-supervised authentication.
Supported publication of verified findings while rejecting unsupported murder and identity claims.
reasoning_summary: M29 and EV17 strongly establish an institutional beginning, while EV21 preserves a genuine early human association but cannot prove journalistic authorship. M26 and M40 reinforce plurality and constructed ambiguity, making a human-associated, managed mantle the best reconstruction. The record does not establish a death, a victim, or a responsible party. Arthur’s strongest strategic finish is to claim undisputed origin and stewardship, endorse Nadia conditionally, and favor transparent publication of verified material.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Probably yes—a human claimant was associated with the early mantle, though human authorship is unproved.
